calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to SEP-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. ***NOTE: The court intends to dismiss the case if plaintiff does not appear at the next hearing.*** Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Self Represted Plaintiff. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set July-17-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to April 17, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
